paper_title: From Crowdsourced Data to High-Quality Benchmarks: Arena-Hard and BenchBuilder Pipeline
evaluation_method: LLM-as-a-judge pairwise comparison against a strong baseline model (GPT-4-0314). A strong judge model categorizes preference into five labels: A>>B, A>B, A~=B, B>A, B>>A. To mitigate position bias, a two-game setup is used where models are swapped in first and second position, resulting in 1000 judgments per model evaluation. The Bradley-Terry model is used to produce final scores, transformed to win-rate against the baseline with 95% confidence intervals via 100 rounds of bootstrapping.
